steps: Open the Leave Tracker from the left sidebar
Choose the appropriate leave type (Sick, Casual, Earned, etc.)
Select the dates (full day or half day)
Add a reason for your leave
Click on Submit to send your request
rules: Your leave request will need approval from your manager
Make sure you select the correct leave type
It’s a good idea to check your leave balance before applying
mistakes: Applying without checking available leave balance
entries.fallback: If you're unsure about which leave to apply for, you can check the P360 Employee Handbook under Files → Organisation → Policy.

steps: Go to Time Tracker and click on 'Log Time'
Select the correct client, project, and job
Add a short description of the work you did
Click on Save and then submit your timesheet
rules: Timesheets should be submitted every week
All fields are required, so make sure nothing is left blank
mistakes: Forgetting to fill in required fields
Selecting the wrong project or job
entries.fallback: If you're confused about what to fill in, you can refer to the P360 Employee Handbook under Files → Organisation → Policy.

steps: Open the Zoho People mobile app
Tap on 'Check-in' when you start your shift
Tap on 'Check-out' once your shift ends
rules: You need to check in and check out every working day
Make sure you follow your assigned working hours
mistakes: Forgetting to check in at the start of the day
Forgetting to check out after your shift
entries.fallback: If you face any confusion, you can refer to the P360 Employee Handbook under Files → Organisation → Policy.

when_to_use: If you forgot to check in or check out
If the Zoho app was not working
If you attended induction or training
If it was a client holiday
If you had a flexible schedule issue
steps: Go to the Attendance or Regularization section in Zoho People
Enter the correct timings or relevant details
Wait for your manager to review and approve it
rules: Regularization requests always require manager approval
Make sure your request follows company attendance policies
entries.fallback: If you're not sure whether to raise a request, you can check the P360 Employee Handbook under Files → Organisation → Policy.
